activity.title: Activity Log
activity.description: An event track of actions and document uploads inside the M&A workspace. Provides a verifiable audit trail for due diligence.

userId.description: Firebase UID of the logged-in user, or 'guest'.

userEmail.description: Email address of the logged-in user, or fallback address.

category.description: The functional domain of the audit event.

details.description: Comprehensive audit comments or logs describing the operation.

activities/{activityId}.description: Collection of all audited user, agent, and system actions within the M&A war room.
